title: Classify All Compatibility Bridges (Permanent/Temporary/Obsolete)
description:
Council Review Sprint 51 Critical Task.

Label every compatibility bridge in MemorySmith.Agent with: owner, purpose, replacement, removal criteria, target sprint.

Bridges to classify:
- MoveToTool context-carry fallback (nearestX/Y/Z)
- AgentBackgroundService selective context-key merge
- ChatInterpreter legacy regex paths
- HtnTaskLibrary fallback decomposers
- ChatInterpretation.GoalName backward-compat field

Document classifications in Data/Pages/architecture.md.

Source: Council Review 2026-06-26 audit-findings-consolidation, DA-007

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council report: Data/Pages/council/audit-findings-consolidation-council-2026-06-26.md

This task is part of Sprint 51 "Canonicalize & Classify" — the zero-risk prep work phase. All bridges should be documented before any extraction work begins in Sprint 52.
